description: Create a computerized Trail Making Test (Parts A & B) in PsychoPy, a neuropsychological test of visual attention and task switching where subjects click circles in sequence. Prepare two CSV files in /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/conditions/: `tmt_part_a.csv` (25 rows, labels 1-25) and `tmt_part_b.csv` (25 rows, alternating labels 1, A, 2, B... 12, L, 13), both using columns `label`, `xPos`, `yPos`, and `correctOrder` with non-overlapping random positions (approx -0.5 to 0.5). Construct the experiment at /home/ga/PsychoPyExperiments/trail_making_test.psyexp featuring routines `instructions_a`, `part_a`, `transition`, `part_b`, and `end_screen`. The implementation must display all targets simultaneously for each part and validate the correct clicking sequence (numerical for Part A, alternating alphanumeric for Part B).
